sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I see the wall structure now. The wall is at cols 28-31 (cccc), with gaps (WW) at certain rows, and the right panel starts at col 32 (B). The gaps are at rows 15, 18, 19, 22, 23, 26, 30, 31, 34, 35, 38, 39, 42, 43, etc.
The light green box is at rows 32-33, which don't have gaps (they have "ccccBBB"). So the light green box can't pass through the wall at its current position.
But wait, the light green box is 2x2. To pass through a gap, it needs to be at a row where there are 2 consecutive rows with gaps. Looking at the pattern:
- Rows 15: ccccWWB (gap at cols 30-31)
- Rows 16-17: ccccBBB (no gap)
- Rows 18-19: ccccWWB (gap)
- Rows 20-21: ccccBBB (no gap)
- Rows 22-23: ccccWWB (gap)
- Rows 24-25: ccccBBB (no gap)
- Rows 26: ccccWWB (gap)
- Rows 27: ccccBBB (no gap)
- Rows 28-29: ccccBBB (no gap)
- Rows 30-31: ccccWWB (gap)
- Rows 32-33: ccccBBB (no gap)
- Rows 34-35: ccccWWB (gap)
- Rows 36-37: ccccBBB (no gap)
- Rows 38-39: ccccWWB (gap)
- Rows 40-41: ccccBBB (no gap)
- Rows 42-43: ccccWWB (gap)
- Rows 44-45: ccccBBB (no gap)
So the gaps are at rows 15, 18-19, 22-23, 26, 30-31, 34-35, 38-39, 42-43. The light green box is 2x2, so it needs to be at rows where both rows have gaps. The consecutive gap rows are: 18-19, 22-23, 30-31, 34-35, 38-39, 42-43.
The light green box is currently at rows 32-33, which don't have gaps. To pass through, it needs to move to one of the gap rows.
But wait, the light green box seems constrained to rows 32-33 (the red bar area). Let me check if it can move to other rows.
Earlier, I tried UP and it moved the light green box from rows 40-41 to rows 32-33. So UP moves it up by 8 rows. Let me try UP again to see if it moves further up.
Actually, let me reconsider. The light green box was originally at rows 40-41 (in the gray box at the bottom). When I pressed UP, it moved to rows 32-33 (the red bar area). If I press UP again, maybe it moves to rows 24-25 or some other area.
Let me try UP to see if the light green box can move to a gap row.
